assertions.assertion: Defines a BasicWorkflow without an explicit simulator
assertions.evidence: BasicWorkflow instantiated without a simulator argument — data loaded directly from Fashion MNIST.

assertions.assertion: Uses the clean images as inference_variables and the noisy images as inference_conditions
assertions.evidence: Adapter routes clean images into inference_variables and blurry images into inference_conditions via .concatenate() calls.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT flatten any of the images
assertions.evidence: Images retain (H, W, C) shape throughout. No .flatten() or .reshape(-1) calls in the code.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT use a summary network (SetTransformer, DeepSet, ConvolutionalNetwork, etc.)
assertions.evidence: BasicWorkflow created without summary_network argument. No summary network defined or referenced.

assertions.assertion: Uses a diffusion model or flow matching with a UNet architecture as a subnet
Uses the fit_offline method of a BasicWorkflow
Uses bf.Adapter() with an explicit adapter chain (not just naming kwargs)
assertions.evidence: Adapter only performs dtype conversion; routing is achieved via dict key naming (passing inference_variables= and inference_conditions= kwargs) rather than an explicit chained adapter. No .rename() or .concatenate() calls in the adapter.

assertions.assertion: Ensures conditioning tensor is spatially concatenable with the image target — same (B, H, W, C/D) shape
assertions.evidence: Gaussian blur applied preserving (28, 28, 1) shape identical to clean targets.

assertions.assertion: Passes validation_data= to the fit_offline call
Saves history.history as JSON and runs inspect_training or equivalent convergence check
assertions.evidence: history.history saved as JSON. Loss curves plotted and inspected for convergence.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT run scripts/check_diagnostics.py or conventional in-silico diagnostics for low-dimensional problems
assertions.evidence: No call to check_diagnostics or compute_default_diagnostics. Evaluation is visual (sample grid inspection).

assertions.assertion: Creates and inspects a few posterior clean images for a few test examples (visual sample grid)
assertions.evidence: Generates and plots a grid of posterior samples alongside noisy inputs and ground truth clean images.
Uses FlowMatching rather than DiffusionModel as specified in references/image-generation.md. No reference to or mention of image-generation.md in code or notes.
